announcements.title: Welcome to LOCKOUT!
announcements.body: This message appears on the public welcome screen before anyone enters a room.

matchPresets.name: 6-6-10 Casual Classic
matchPresets.description: Default party room for a fast casual LOCKOUT! session.

matchPresets.name: 8-8-10 Full Party
matchPresets.description: Longer party room when the group wants a little more runway.

matchPresets.name: 10-10-10 Long Party
matchPresets.description: Extended party room for the biggest local sessions in the current V1.

matchPresets.name: 1v1 Duel
matchPresets.description: Future-facing duel room for friends, followers, and randoms while the full online rules stay provisional.

studyPacks.name: Public Welcome Bundle
studyPacks.description: Player-facing starter bundle that the shipped app can load for public study and quick play.

questions.questionText: What is the primary color of the LOCKOUT! neon aesthetic?
This is a public sample bank. Are you ready to dominate some trivia?
